title: ShadowRealm
tagline: Personal homelab and self-hosted infrastructure playground.
description: ShadowRealm is the personal homelab environment — self-hosted services, network configuration, containerized workloads, and infrastructure experiments. Documented as a living reference for setup, tooling, and lessons learned.
story: Every developer needs a place to break things safely. ShadowRealm is that place — where new stacks get tested, network configs get experimented on, and nothing is production-critical.
journey: ShadowRealm started as a single Raspberry Pi and turned into a proper homelab over time. The real value wasn't the hardware — it was having a place where I could run anything, break anything, and actually understand what was happening at the infrastructure level. Networking, DNS, containers, reverse proxies — things that are abstracted away in cloud platforms became real and tangible here.
forWho: Developers and infrastructure enthusiasts interested in self-hosted tooling, homelab setups, and hands-on networking.

detailedSpecs.architecture: Proxmox hypervisor running containerized and VM workloads. Nginx reverse proxy with Cloudflare DNS. Docker Compose for service orchestration.
keyPatterns: Proxmox VM and LXC container management
Nginx reverse proxy with SSL termination
Cloudflare DNS + tunnel for external access
